content: Remote OK Product Manager AI YipitData About Us:YipitData is the leading market research and analytics firm for the disruptive economy and most recently raised $475M from The Carlyle Group at a valuation of over $1B. Every day, our proprietary technology analyzes billions of alternative data points to uncover actionable insights across sectors like software, AI, cloud, e-commerce, ridesharing, and payments.Our data and research teams transform raw data into strategic intelligence, delivering accurate, timely, and deeply contextualized analysis that our customersâranging from the worldâs top investment funds to Fortune 500 companiesâdepend on to drive high-stakes decisions. From sourcing and licensing novel datasets to rigorous analysis and expert narrative framing, our teams ensure clients get not just data, but clarity and confidence.We operate globally with offices in the US, APAC, and India. Our award-winning, people-centric cultureârecognized by Inc. as a Best Workplace for three consecutive yearsâemphasizes transparency, ownership, and continuous mastery.What Itâs Like to Work at YipitData:YipitData isnât a place for coast product manager, exec, dev US Remote 2026-07-13T22:00:32+00:00 1134770 https://remoteOK.com/remote-jobs/remote-product-manager-ai-yipitdata-1134770 https://remoteOK.com/assets/logo-square.png Podcaster and Content Creator Psychology Today Psychology Today Psychology Today is launching a new interview-style podcast exploring psychology, behavioral science, and the broader culture. We're looking for someone to serve as the show's podcaster. This is a rare opportunity to shape a new editorial product from the ground up, with real creative latitude over how the show sounds, looks, and grows.<br><br>The ideal candidate can develop, schedule and lead conversations with guests, with an eye for strong topics, on-air chemistry and what makes social media packaging/clipping of material across PT's many social media platforms.<br><br>Note: A Psychology Today staff editor will occasionally co-host or step in as host for select episodes.<br><br><strong>Responsibilities<br><br></strong>Hosting &amp; Editorial<br><br><ul><li>Research topics, prepare questions, and plan/outline episodes</li><li>Bring sharp editorial judgment and creative initiative to pitch and shape new episode ideas and formats</li><li>Identify, research, and book guests (bloggers, subject-matter experts, researchers)</li><li>Prepare for each episode â background research, question development, brief pre-interview calls with guests</li><li>Maintain an organized, visible guest pipeline/calendar (upcoming guests, topics, scheduling status)<br><br></li></ul><strong>Requirements<br><br></strong><ul><li>Demonstrated podcasting experience â please share platforms, shows, or projects you've built, hosted, or produced</li><li>Strong writing and editing fundamentals; familiarity with SEO and content management systems to maximize the reach of show notes. </li><li>Comfortable and engaging on camera/mic</li><li>A background in behavioral science, translational science writing, or clinical/research psychology is a strong plus; an individual with strong journalistic experience is also welcome to apply</li><li>Collaborate with producer/editors on episode direction and quality, but they are not responsible for editing or technical production<br><br></li></ul><strong>To apply, please send a brief cover letter that:<br><br></strong><ul><li>Characterizes the editorial content delivered by the Psychology Today expert authors on the homepage, and share who/if anyone you'd reach out to as a possible guest. Please share names of expert authors/bloggers whom you considered and why you landed on the individual you're pitching at this time. Please include a brief overview of how you'd approach the conversation, including several kick-off questions. </li><li>Describes your experience with podcasting â platforms, shows, or projects you've hosted, produced, or contributed to (please include links/samples)<br><br></li></ul><strong>Benefits<br><br></strong>Contract position, no benefits. $2,000/month, based on weekly episode cadence (:4 episodes/month) plus ongoing guest-booking responsibilities. analyst, design, sys admin New York, New York, New York, United States 2026-07-13T20:50:31+00:00 1134808 https://remoteOK.com/remote-jobs/remote-podcaster-and-content-creator-psychology-today-psychology-today-1134808 https://remoteOK.com/assets/logo-square.png Procurement Officer Gale's Agro Products <p>We are seeking an experienced and dedicated Procurement Officer to join our team. The successful candidate will play a key role in managing the procurement process, ensuring stock availability, and maintaining optimal inventory levels. This role requires a proactive individual with strong negotiation skills, attention to detail, and the ability to work collaboratively with sales and retail teams.</p><p><strong>Key Responsibilities:</strong></p><ul><li>Manage the procurement process to ensure stock availability aligns with sales demands.</li><li>Liaise regularly with the Sales Manager and Retail Supervisor to forecast needs and plan inventory.</li><li>Source and negotiate with suppliers to secure the best prices and quality.</li><li>Monitor stock levels and coordinate timely replenishment to prevent shortages or overstocking.</li><li>Maintain accurate records of purchases, supplier details, and inventory levels.</li><li>Work closely with the sales team to identify popular products and adjust procurement strategies accordingly.</li><li>Stay informed about industry trends, new products, and supplier developments.</li></ul><p><strong>Requirements:</strong></p><ul><li>Strong proficiency with MS Dynamics or similar ERP systems.</li><li>Proven experience in procurement, inventory management, or retail purchasing.</li><li>Strong communication and negotiation skills.</li><li>Ability to work collaboratively with sales and retail teams.</li><li>Excellent organisational and analytical abilities.</li><li>Proficiency in MS Office and inventory management software.</li></ul><p><br></p> supervisor, dev, exec Six Cross Roads, 2026-07-13T19:57:19+00:00 1134769 https://remoteOK.com/remote-jobs/remote-procurement-officer-gales-agro-products-1134769 https://remoteOK.com/assets/logo-square.png Clases de Refuerzo Primaria Media Jornada Tusclasesparticulares En <strong>Tusclasesparticulares</strong>, empresa lÃ­der en el sector educativo, buscamos profesores para dar clases particulares de refuerzo escolar para alumnos de primaria.<br><br>Â¿Quieres ser el prÃ³ximo en ayudar a alumnos a alcanzar sus metas?
